name: Analyze Weakness
description: You study a creature or object to identify vulnerabilities. When targeting a creature, your next attack against them has advantage and deals +1d6 damage. When targeting magic items, learn their properties.
effect: Your next attack against the studied target has advantage and deals +1d6 extra damage. Magic item properties are revealed instantly.
notes: 1-minute casting time — out-of-combat only. Use before entering a room or after a short rest.
The +1d6 damage advantage buff lasts 1 round after casting completes.
Identifying a magic item requires touch (range 0) and reveals attunement requirements and properties.
